s2.ptxt: Inspect the turning of the ball joint.

s3.ptxt: Secure the rear stabilizer link assembly in a vise using aluminum plates.
Install the nut to the rear stabilizer link assembly stud.
Using a torque wrench, turn the nut continuously at a rate of 3 to 5 seconds per turn and take the torque reading on the 5th turn.

atten4.ptxt: If the turning torque is not within the specified range, replace the rear stabilizer link assembly with a new one.

s3.ptxt: Check that the dust cover is not cracked and that there is no grease on it.
